**Feature**
What would you like added (e.g. pagination helpers, user queries, MR support)?

**Use case**
Primarily for automation with Grok Build and structured GitLab Work Items.

**Proposed API (if applicable)**

**Checklist**
- [ ] Review and approval required before any remote action or merge to main — see AGENTS.md and BASE-STANDARDS-FOR-ORCHESTRATED-REPOS.md.
- [ ] Aligns with GitLab EE GraphQL best practices and cursor pagination.
